final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input d,
    output reg q,
    output reg q_n
);always @(posedge clk or negedge reset) begin
        if (~reset) begin
            q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

    assign q_n = ~q;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= 1'b1; q_n <= 1'b0;
    end
  end

endmodule
